name: CFC/PFIC Look-Through Election

eligibility.description: US shareholders of CFCs or taxpayers making a section 1295 election for a PFIC that is a partner in a partnership.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Treats US shareholders of Controlled Foreign Corporations (CFCs) or PFICs as partners for audit purposes, potentially allowing for more favorable adjustment flows.
